# {{ site.data.author.name }}

> Personal and professional website of Alessandro "kLeZ" Accardo, an Italian
> software developer. Most content is written in Italian. Topics include free
> and open-source software, software architecture, Linux, development practices,
> and tech culture. Open to remote work opportunities.

- Site language: Italian (it). Author also reads/writes English.
- Canonical URL: {{ site.url }}
- Atom feed: {{ '/feed.xml' | absolute_url }}
- Sitemap: {{ '/sitemap.xml' | absolute_url }}

## Key pages
- [About]({{ '/about' | absolute_url }}): who Alessandro is.
- [Curriculum Vitae]({{ '/cv' | absolute_url }}): professional experience and skills.
- [Contacts]({{ '/contatti' | absolute_url }}): how to get in touch.
- [Blog]({{ '/blog' | absolute_url }}): full list of posts.

## Recent posts

{% endfor %}
## Notes for agents
- URLs are stable (permalink pattern: /:year/:month/:day/:title/).
- Structured data (schema.org Person + WebSite) is embedded as JSON-LD.
